name: data-warehouse-analytics-query-optimization-advisor
description: T184 QueryOptimizationAdvisor — QUERY_ENGINE archetype. Read-only optimization suggestions. Scoped to tenant query patterns. T187 quota check NOT required (read-only, no warehouse execution).

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: read-only suggestions only, no warehouse execution, T187 quota check NOT required, tenant query patterns scoped
Retrieve QUERY_ENGINE arch pattern + query-optimization + read-only-advisor + no-quota-check + tenant-query-patterns patterns for T184

Break T184 into: receive query text → analyze query structure → load tenant query patterns from DATABASE → generate optimization suggestions → return OptimizationReport (NO warehouse execution, NO T187 quota call)

Generate query-optimization-advisor.service.ts — HTTP GET via DynamicController, analyzes query structure and returns optimization suggestions (index hints, filter reordering, etc.). Scoped to tenant query patterns from ALS. Read-only — NEVER executes against warehouse. T187 QuotaManager NOT called (read-only has no quota cost). Returns OptimizationReport with ranked suggestions.
Named check validation: read_only_no_execution, t187_not_called, tenant_scoped_patterns, optimization_suggestions_returned, no_warehouse_access
Score generated code 0-100 against T184 iron rules: read-only, no T187 call, tenant scoping, useful optimization output
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=read-only-advisor+no-t187-call+tenant-scoped-patterns, rejected=executes-warehouse-query OR calls-t187-quota OR cross-tenant-patterns. curriculumTier=1.
